buyTokens(uint256).details: Stablecoins preferred for exact USD pricing      ETH uses tier 2 (public) at $0.07 + configurable ethPriceUsd rate

params.lockPeriod: Lock duration: 0 (no lock), 90 days, or 180 days

params.referrer: Address of the referrer (must have already purchased)

buyWithStable(address,uint256,uint8,uint.details: PREFERRED METHOD - exact USD pricing, no volatility      Requires prior approval of stablecoin to this contract

params.amount: Amount of stablecoin to spend (in stablecoin decimals)
params.lockPeriod: Lock duration: 0 (no lock), 90 days, or 180 days
params.stablecoin: Address of the stablecoin to use
Address of the stablecoin to use

calculateListingPrice().details: Listing price scales with presale success (in USD terms):      - < 50% sold ($1.225M) → $0.10 listing (minimum)      - >= 50% sold → Price scales from $0.10 to $0.14

calculateTokensFromUsd(uint256).details: Legacy function for backward compatibility, defaults to tier 2

params.usdAmount: Amount in USD (6 decimals, like USDC)
Amount in USD (6 decimals, like USDC)

cancelPurchase(uint256).details: Returns tokens to presale pool, does NOT return payment (that goes to treasury)      Users get credit that can be used for a new purchase or tracked for refund

params.index: Index of the purchase to cancel

claimAll().details: Claims both immediate and locked (if unlocked) for all purchases

claimImmediate(uint256[]).details: Each purchase has an immediate unlock portion based on lock period

params.indices: Array of purchase indices to claim from

claimLocked(uint256[]).details: Reverts if lock period hasn't expired yet

params.indices: Array of purchase indices to claim from

claimReferralBonus().details: Referrers can claim their 3% bonus on all referred purchases

claimRefund().details: Users can claim back their ETH contribution

claimStableRefund(address).details: Users can claim back their stablecoin contribution

params.stablecoin: Address of the stablecoin to refund

depositTokens().details: VFIDEToken pre-mints 50M to this contract at genesis.      35M for base sale + 15M for bonus pool.      This function verifies the pre-mint and marks deposit complete.

emergencyWithdraw().details: Cannot be used during sale, during refund period, or if refunds enabled H-25 Fix: Use call instead of deprecated transfer() for better gas handling

enableRefunds().details: Can only be called by DAO after sale ends and minimum goal not reached

finalizePresale().details: LP tokens come from Treasury, not presale contract      Unsold tokens are returned to treasury

fundRefunds().details: Allows treasury to return ETH for refund claims

fundStableRefunds(address,uint256).details: Allows treasury to return stablecoins for refund claims

params.amount: The amount to send (from treasury) H-24 Fix: Use SafeERC20 for non-standard tokens like USDT

returns.requiredLock: The minimum lock period required for this tier

params.stablecoins: Array of stablecoin addresses to check

returns.amounts: Array of contribution amounts for each stablecoin

returns.available: Whether tier is enabled and has supply

params.newMaxGasPrice: New maximum gas price in wei

returns.shouldEnable: True if sale ended and goal not met

withdrawUnsold(address).details: Can only be called after finalization, sends unsold presale allocation

buyTokens(uint256).notice: Purchase VFIDE tokens with ETH (legacy support, uses tier 2 public price)

buyTokensWithReferral(uint256,address).notice: Buy tokens with ETH + referral (legacy support, uses tier 2 public price)

buyWithStable(address,uint256,uint8,uint.notice: Purchase VFIDE tokens with stablecoin (USDC, USDT, DAI, etc.)

buyWithStableReferral(address,uint256,ui.notice: Purchase VFIDE tokens with stablecoin + referral

calculateListingPrice().notice: Calculate listing price based on presale results

calculateTokens(uint256).notice: Calculate tokens for an ETH amount (uses current ETH/USD rate)

calculateTokensFromEth(uint256).notice: Calculate base tokens from ETH amount using current ETH/USD rate

calculateTokensFromEthTier(uint256,uint8.notice: Calculate base tokens from ETH for a specific tier

calculateTokensFromUsd(uint256).notice: Calculate base tokens from USD amount (uses tier 2 - public price)

calculateTokensFromUsdPreview(uint256,ui.notice: Calculate tokens for a USD amount (stablecoin purchase preview)

calculateTokensFromUsdTier(uint256,uint8.notice: Calculate base tokens from USD amount for a specific tier

canClaimRefund(address).notice: Check if user can claim refund

canClaimStableRefund(address,address).notice: Check if user can claim stablecoin refund

cancelPurchase(uint256).notice: Cancel a purchase before claiming (only if not yet claimed)

claimAll().notice: Claim ALL unlocked tokens in one transaction (gas efficient batch claim)

claimImmediate(uint256[]).notice: Claim immediately unlocked tokens from purchases

claimLocked(uint256[]).notice: Claim locked tokens that have passed their unlock time

claimReferralBonus().notice: Claim referral bonuses (available after presale is finalized)

claimRefund().notice: Claim refund if presale failed to meet minimum goal

claimStableRefund(address).notice: Claim stablecoin refund if presale failed to meet minimum goal

depositTokens().notice: Verify VFIDE tokens are available in presale contract

emergencyWithdraw().notice: Emergency withdraw of contract balance (ONLY before sale or after finalization)

enableRefunds().notice: Enable refunds if minimum goal not met

finalizePresale().notice: Finalize presale and calculate listing price

fundRefunds().notice: DAO can fund refunds by sending ETH back to contract

fundStableRefunds(address,uint256).notice: DAO can fund stablecoin refunds by sending tokens back

getAllPurchases(address).notice: Get all purchases for a user with full details

getRefundStatus(address).notice: Get refund status for a user

getTierPrice(uint8).notice: Get price for a tier in microUSD (1e6 = $1)

getTierRemaining(uint8).notice: Get remaining supply for a tier

getTierRequiredLock(uint8).notice: Get required lock period for a tier

isEthPriceStale().notice: Check if ETH price is stale (not updated within 24 hours)

recoverUnclaimedRefunds().notice: Recover unclaimed refund funds after deadline (treasury use)

setEthPrice(uint256).notice: Update ETH/USD price for ETH purchases

setMaxGasPrice(uint256).notice: Update max gas price for circuit breaker

shouldEnableRefunds().notice: Check if refunds should be enabled (automatic check)

withdrawUnsold(address).notice: Withdraw unsold tokens after finalization (goes to treasury/burn)
